name: vela-rbxts-lsp
description: VS Code extension that launches the standalone Vela RBXTS Rust LSP.

velaRbxts.lsp.serverPath.description: Optional path to the standalone vela-rbxts LSP executable. When empty, the extension uses the published @vela-rbxts/lsp wrapper package when its matching platform binary dependency is installed.

velaRbxts.lsp.trace.server.description: Trace level forwarded to the vela-rbxts language client.

velaRbxts.lsp.enabled.description: Enable the standalone vela-rbxts Rust LSP integration for TypeScript and TSX files.

scripts.package:vsix: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build && node ./scripts/package-vsix.cjs
